nasb.text: and with all the deception of wickedness for those who perish, because they did not receive the love of the truth so as to be saved.

esv.text: and with all wicked deception for those who are perishing, because they refused to love the truth and so be saved.

cnv.text: 並且在那些沉淪的人身上，行各樣不義的欺詐，因為他們不領受愛真理的心，使他們得救。

ccb.text: 用尽各样诡计欺骗那些将要灭亡的人，因为他们不喜欢接受那能拯救他们的真理。

csbs.text: 并且使用一切不义的诡计，因为他们不接受那能使他们得救的真理之爱。
